1.gl: to walk (in a great variety of applications, literally and figuratively)

1.dv: akin to H3212 (יָלַךְ); a primitive root;

1.gl: a man as an individual or a male person; often used as an adjunct to a more definite term (and in such cases frequently not expressed in translation)
1.kj: also, another, any (man), a certain, [phrase] champion, consent, each, every (one), fellow, (foot-, husband-) man, (good-, great, mighty) man, he, high (degree), him (that is), hus
1.dv: contracted for H582 (אֱנוֹשׁ) (or perhaps rather from an unused root meaning to be extant);

1.gl: properly, to sit down (specifically as judge. in ambush, in quiet); by implication, to dwell, to remain; causatively, to settle, to marry

1.gl: to stand, in various relations (literal and figurative, intransitive and transitive)

1.gl: a seat; figuratively, a site; abstractly, a session; by extension an abode (the place or the time); by implication, population
1.kj: assembly, dwell in, dwelling(-place), wherein (that) dwelt (in), inhabited place, seat, sitting, situation, sojourning.

1.gl: a road (as trodden); figuratively, a course of life or mode of action, often adverb
1.kj: along, away, because of, [phrase] by, conversation, custom, (east-) ward, journey, manner, passenger, through, toward, (high-) (path-) way(-side), whither(-soever).

2.gl: pleasure; hence (abstractly) desire; concretely, a valuable thing; hence (by extension) a matter (as something in mind)
2.kj: acceptable, delight(-some), desire, things desired, matter, pleasant(-ure), purpose, willingly.

2.gl: to murmur (in pleasure or anger); by implication, to ponder
2.kj: imagine, meditate, mourn, mutter, roar, [idiom] sore, speak, study, talk, utter.

2.gl: properly, a twist (away of the light), i.e. night; figuratively, adversity
2.dv: or (Isaiah 21:11) לֵיל; also לַיְלָה; from the same as H3883 (לוּל);

2.gl: Jehovah, Jewish national name of God
2.kj: Jehovah, the Lord. Compare H3050 (יָהּ), H3069 (יְהֹוִה).

2.gl: a precept or statute, especially the Decalogue or Pentateuch

3.gl: to give, used with greatest latitude of application (put, make, etc.)

3.gl: time, especially (adverb with preposition) now, when, etc.

3.kj: break out, come (mightily), go over, be good, be meet, be profitable, (cause to, effect, make to, send) prosper(-ity, -ous, -ously).

4.kj: air, anger, blast, breath, [idiom] cool, courage, mind, [idiom] quarter, [idiom] side, spirit(-ual), tempest, [idiom] vain, (whirl-) wind(-y).

4.gl: morally wrong; concretely, an (actively) bad person
4.kj: [phrase] condemned, guilty, ungodly, wicked (man), that did wrong.

4.gl: chaff (as pressed out, i.e. winnowed or (rather) threshed loose)

6.kj: break, destroy(-uction), [phrase] not escape, fail, lose, (cause to, make) perish, spend, [idiom] and surely, take, be undone, [idiom] utterly, be void of, have no way to flee.

6.kj: along, away, because of, [phrase] by, conversation, custom, (east-) ward, journey, manner, passenger, through, toward, (high-) (path-) way(-side), whither(-soever).
